title: More Column Options for "My Work"
excerpt: We use job numbers in our “items” and then have a column for ‘project descriptions’… so essentially, allowing us to add our own column, instead of the limited choices, would make life MUCH easier and make “My Work” usefu…

posts.author: ronniekhalil (Ronnie Khalil)
posts.cookedHtml: We use job numbers in our “items” and then have a column for ‘project descriptions’… so essentially, allowing us to add our own column, instead of the limited choices, would make life MUCH easier and make “My Work” useful as opposed to the most useless thing in all of monday.com.
